docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEZA, MARTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAMBULA, ALBERTO $825.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $825.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
